title: Tighten a single-channel observable bound with explicit positivity kernels
summary: Recast a single-channel observable constraint into an optimization problem with explicit positivity kernels and typed normalization assumptions.

expected_artifacts.description: Step-by-step derivation of the bound and assumptions (NOT_FOR_CITATION).

verification_plan: Deterministic script reproduces a baseline bound then shows tightening under the new constraint; persist inputs/outputs/plots.
risks: Numerical instability; mitigate with toy checks.

title: Extend the same method to a coupled-channel setting (record only)
summary: Potential extension of the same constraint machinery to a coupled-channel target. Out of scope for this minimal single-channel campaign, but record for reuse.
scope_notes: Out-of-scope: coupled-channel target. Record only; do not execute in this campaign.
verification_plan: If promoted later, start by reproducing a single published baseline in the coupled-channel setting before attempting any new tightening.
risks: Scope violation for current campaign; must not execute.
